title: Splitting p1 (1xT75) to p2 (2xT150)
author: Andrea Argouarch
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8gnhtve

steps.title: At 90-100% confluency, split T75 flask into 2xT150 flasks
steps.instruction: At 90-100% confluency, split T75 flask into 2xT150 flasks

steps.title: Turn off UV lights and clean hood with 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: Turn off UV lights and clean hood with 70% ethanol

steps.title: Clean items with 70% ethanol and bring into hood a
steps.instruction: Clean items with 70% ethanol and bring into hood a. DPBS -/- DPBS, no calcium, no magnesium Thermo Fisher Catalog #14190250 b. Sterile Filtered Media DMEM, high glucose, pyruvate Thermo Fisher Catalog #11995073 Penicillin-Streptomycin Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15140122 Fetal Bovine Serum VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #97068-091 c. Label 2xT150 flasks with ID, date, and p2, add 28 mls 28 mL of media per flask d. 0.05% Trypsin Trypsin-EDTA (0.05%), phenol red Thermo Fisher Catalog #25300062

steps.title: Rinse by adding 5 mls 5...
steps.instruction: Rinse by adding 5 mls 5 mL of DPBS per flask and gently swirling

steps.title: Add 2 mls 2 mL of...
steps.instruction: Add 2 mls 2 mL of trypsin per flask and place in incubator 37 °C for 2-3 mins 00:03:00 until cells are stating to detach a. Can also gently tap the side of the flask to detach cells

steps.title: Add 10 mls 10 mL of...
steps.instruction: Add 10 mls 10 mL of fibroblast media per flask to inactivate trypsin

steps.title: Collect cell suspension in a 15 ml conical
steps.instruction: Collect cell suspension in a 15 ml conical

steps.title: Spin at 600 rpm 600 rpm for 4 mins 00:04:00
steps.instruction: Spin at 600 rpm 600 rpm for 4 mins 00:04:00

steps.title: Aspirate supernatant, being careful to not aspirate the pellet
steps.instruction: Aspirate supernatant, being careful to not aspirate the pellet

steps.title: Add fibroblast media to 4 mls 4 mL
steps.instruction: Add fibroblast media to 4 mls 4 mL

steps.title: Add 2 ml 2 mL of cell suspension per flask
steps.instruction: Add 2 ml 2 mL of cell suspension per flask

steps.title: Place flask in incubator (5% CO2...
steps.instruction: Place flask in incubator (5% CO2 , 37 o C 37 °C )

steps.title: Observe and feed the next day,...
steps.instruction: Observe and feed the next day, then feed every 2-3 days until 90-100% confluent

steps.title: Clean and sterilize hood with 70%...
steps.instruction: Clean and sterilize hood with 70% ethanol and turn on UV

description: Update cell culture notes in lab notebook
